title: All you need in one place, right on your doorstep
description: BUSINESS NEWS - A vast selection of goods...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Advertorial","html":"Advertorial"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - A vast selection of goods can be found in Mossel Bay at Koala Shopping, one of the largest department stores in the Garden Route area.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - A vast selection of goods can be found in Mossel Bay at Koala Shopping, one of the largest department stores in the Garden Route area."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Koala Shopping offers a truly unique experience, with a huge range of high quality products all under one roof, right here in town."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Centrally located at one of the largest spaces in Mossel Bay, at 12 Bolton Road in Voorbaai, Koala Shopping has everything from homeware, kitchenware and electronics, to braais, storage solutions, home decor and outdoor seating.","html":"Centrally located at one of the largest spaces in Mossel Bay, at 12 Bolton Road in Voorbaai, Koala Shopping has everything from homeware, kitchenware and electronics, to braais, storage solutions, home decor and outdoor seating."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Koala Shopping also boasts a large fishing department at its store in Mossel Bay, as well as one of the largest baking and cutlery departments of the stores in the Garden Route area.","html":"Koala Shopping also boasts a large fishing department at its store in Mossel Bay, as well as one of the largest baking and cutlery departments of the stores in the Garden Route area."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Looking for birthday gifts or fun games and toys for the children? Koala Shopping has you covered.","html":"Looking for birthday gifts or fun games and toys for the children? Koala Shopping has you covered."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"How about arts and crafts to satisfy your creative streak, or heaters now that the evenings are cool? Koala Shopping has a wide selection.","html":"How about arts and crafts to satisfy your creative streak, or heaters now that the evenings are cool? Koala Shopping has a wide selection."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Want to plan ahead for your summer holiday or get started on that home DIY project? Koala Shopping has travelling bags, suitcases, light and shower fixtures, and a variety of hardware for whatever you need.","html":"Want to plan ahead for your summer holiday or get started on that home DIY project? Koala Shopping has travelling bags, suitcases, light and shower fixtures, and a variety of hardware for whatever you need."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There are also vehicle, stationery, carpet, bathroom accessories and blankets for sale.","html":"There are also vehicle, stationery, carpet, bathroom accessories and blankets for sale."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you need it, Koala Shopping most likely has it, and at a price that won’t break the bank.","html":"If you need it, Koala Shopping most likely has it, and at a price that won’t break the bank."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With knowledgeable employees who are always ready to help with a smile, Koala Shopping, open now, invites you to experience the store.","html":"With knowledgeable employees who are always ready to help with a smile, Koala Shopping, open now, invites you to experience the store."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: All you need in one place, right on your doorstep
